analysis —
law a cross-domain exchange is gated by the holder's grant, SANITIZED at the boundary (`released = requested ∩ releasable` — ungranted data never crosses), and [[receipt]]ed — so the requester gets the data AND the provenance proving what was accessed, by whom, under what authority; each party content-addresses and receipts its own side, the provenance [[merge]]s with no shared trust root ([[federation]]).
